description_long: This is a modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof and a minimalist geometric design. The exterior features a combination of light beige and dark gray wall panels, with large glass windows on one side, providing ample natural light. The structure is elevated on a broad, white platform that extends outward, creating a cantilevered effect and a sheltered area beneath. Several trees are positioned around the building, suggesting a landscaped urban setting. The front facade includes a balcony with a metal railing, and the overall layout emphasizes clean lines and open spaces. The building appears to be constructed primarily from concrete, glass, and metal, with a focus on contemporary architectural aesthetics.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with large windows, a cantilevered platform, and a mix of beige and dark gray exterior panels, surrounded by landscaped trees.
description_view_0: Front view showing the balcony, metal railing, and main entrance with trees on the left and rooftop greenery.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the cantilevered platform, beige wall panels, and minimal window presence.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying large glass windows, beige and gray wall sections, and trees in the background.
description_view_3: Opposite front view with the balcony, dark gray panels, and a single tree near the entrance.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows on one side
